author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Existing tests covered basic singularities (sqrt/ln at 0, asin/acosh/atanh at 1); skipped negative-side mirrors and out-of-domain cases.

Added 13 tests covering asin at -1 and outside domain, acos at 1, atanh at -1 and outside domain (pins value-vs-derivative divergence: function NaN but dual formula evaluates to finite -1/3 at x=2), acosh outside domain, sqrt/ln of negative, log2/log10 at zero, ln_1p at -1, powf/powi zero-base/neg-exp, recip at -0.0.

ferray-autodiff: 111 -> 124 lib tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 7144ca58.
